query:
-- Apply correct pricebook costs to ALL SasBoss services where planName exactly matches a pricebook product
-- This fixes the billingPlatform JSON format issue by using LIKE '%SasBoss%' which works on JSON arrays
UPDATE services s
JOIN sasboss_pricebook_items p 
  ON p.version_id = 2
  AND LOWER(TRIM(s.planName)) = LOWER(TRIM(p.product_name))
SET 
  s.monthlyCost = p.partner_buy_price,
  s.costSource = 'sasboss_pricebook',
  s.updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE 
  s.status != 'terminated'
  AND s.billingPlatform LIKE '%SasBoss%'
  AND ABS(s.monthlyCost - p.partner_buy_price) > 0.005;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute

  AND ABS(s.monthlyCost - p.partner_buy_price) > 0.005;
